prompt: A full-body fashion photo of a stylish mature woman standing on a covered outdoor patio in bright natural daytime light. She has voluminous short platinum-blonde hair and a confident pose with both hands on her hips, one leg crossed casually in front of the other. Her face is softly obscured and not detailed. She wears a fitted long-sleeve cropped top in warm rust brown, high-waisted light blue distressed wide-leg jeans with several ripped areas, and chunky brown platform slide sandals. She is heavily accessorized with layered necklaces including one large statement pendant, multiple stacked bracelets, rings, drop earrings, and a smartwatch. She carries a small beaded drawstring bucket bag in cognac brown hanging from one hand. The setting is an upscale backyard lounge with woven dark rattan patio furniture, cream cushions, a striped beige outdoor rug, a blue cabinet with a television above it, sliding glass doors, and greenery visible outside. Add a few pink flowers on the left and fern leaves entering the frame at the bottom right. The overall look should feel like a polished lifestyle influencer outfit photo, realistic smartphone photography, slightly elevated exposure, crisp detail, flattering natural light, vertical composition.
